subject: Mathematics
question_text: Write whether the following statements are True or False? Justify your answer. (i) Point (3, 0) lies in the first quadrant. (ii) Points (1, –1) and (–1, 1) lie in the same quadrant. 1 (iii) The coordinates of a point whose ordinate is − and abscissa is 1 are 2 1 − ,1 . 2 (iv) A point lies on y-axis at a distance of 2 units from the x-axis. Its coordinates are (2, 0). (v) (–1, 7) is a point in the II quadrant.
